summary: Build a romantic 'Will you be my Valentine?' interactive webpage with animated decorations and playful Yes/No interactions.

existing_features.title: Create a single-page romantic landing experience that prominently displays the question text “Will you be my Valentine?” with a romantic layout including hearts and flowers.
Add two clearly labeled buttons: “Yes” and “No”, positioned near the main prompt and styled to match the romantic theme.
Implement the “No” button evasive behavior: when the user tries to click it (e.g., hover/pointer approach), it moves away from the cursor so it is difficult to click.
Implement the “Yes” button celebration state: clicking “Yes” transitions the page into a celebratory view with animated fireworks and hearts popping up.
Define and apply a coherent romantic visual theme (colors, typography, spacing, and components) consistently across the page (avoid blue/purple).
Add required generated static image assets (hearts/flowers/background) under frontend/public/assets/generated and render them in the UI as part of the romantic design.
Update the main heading text on the Valentine landing page to exactly: "WIll you be my valentines zaaaluuttiii?"
Customize the Yes-click celebration text in the celebration view to exactly: "YAAAYYY i lovee youuu smm zaaluubabbyyyyy😘💋"

When the user presses the No button, show an escalating sequence of confirmation prompts starting with "Are you sure?" and continue escalating with each subsequent successful No press, until the user clicks Yes.

Update the Valentine page No button behavior so that after each successful No click, the No button immediately moves to a random position anywhere within the visible viewport (i.e., potentially far away from its previous position), while still keeping the existing evasive behavior on pointer approach and still triggering the existing escalating No prompt logic.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a romantic 'Will you be my Valentine?' landing page with flowers/hearts themed styling
Add Yes/No buttons for the Valentine prompt
On clicking Yes, show a celebratory animation (fireworks + hearts popping up)
Make the No button evade the cursor (moves away when user tries to click)
Customize the main heading text to: "WIll you be my valentines zaaaluuttiii?"
On clicking No, show an escalating sequence of prompts (e.g., "are you sure?") that continues until Yes is clicked
Customize the Yes-click celebration message to: "YAAAYYY i lovee youuu smm zaaluubabbyyyyy😘💋"
Make the No button reposition randomly to a new location anywhere on the screen after each successful click

projectName: Romantic 'Will you be my Valentine?' interactive webpage with playful Yes/No buttons
